name: geogebra-geometry
description: Generate verified GeoGebra construction files from geometry problem text, screenshots, or LaTeX.

interface.longDescription: Turn geometry problem statements, screenshots, or LaTeX into importable GeoGebra .ggb files. The plugin verifies intended conclusions, searches for clean layouts, audits accidental collinearity and other misleading visual relations, and can optionally emit TikZ.
defaultPrompt: Turn this geometry problem into a verified GeoGebra file.
Read this geometry screenshot and generate a clean .ggb diagram.
Audit this construction for accidental collinearity or parallelism.
